project_context.theme: Dark Mode Default, Light Mode Supported

font_family.monospace: JetBrains Mono, Source Code Pro, monospace

rules.letter_spacing: tracking-tight for headings, tracking-normal for body
rules.line_height: leading-tight for headings, leading-relaxed for body

anti_patterns: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans for headings.

rules.tints: Never use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF. Use slightly tinted grays for natural depth.
rules.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for standard text. Highlight AI Debug with the Amber/Yellow accent to make it feel like a distinct feature.
rules.hover_states: Always define explicit hover text and background colors.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight and dense. Use p-2, p-4, p-6 for panels. gap-2 to gap-4 for toolbars.

structure.app_shell: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-background text-foreground
structure.sidebar: w-16 md:w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-border bg-surface flex flex-col
structure.toolbar: h-14 border-b border-border flex items-center px-4 justify-between bg-surface

rules.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px borders everywhere (border-collapse style) to separate panels. No shadows on layout panels.
rules.radius: Keep it sharp. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2-4px) to maintain a highly technical, precise feel.
rules.card_components: Avoid Shadcn Card wrappers if they add too much padding or shadow. Prefer raw divs with precise border and padding.

surface_strategies.primary: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Panels are separated by crisp 1px lines without shadows.
surface_strategies.floating_elements: For dropdowns (e.g., Database Selector) or AI Debug overlays, use Neumorphism (Crisp) with sharp inner contrasts, solid background, 1px border, and a subtle drop-shadow to separate from the grid.

components_and_interactions.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary actions (Run) use primary color bg. Secondary actions (Refresh) use surface bg with border. AI Debug button should have a subtle glow or the amber accent color.
components_and_interactions.editor: Must use a code editor component (like Monaco or CodeMirror via react-simple-code-editor) with JetBrains Mono font and distinct syntax highlighting.
components_and_interactions.data_grid: For SQL results, use a dense Shadcn Table. No rounded corners on the table cells. sticky header. text-sm.
components_and_interactions.tabs: For Sidebar navigation (History, Files, Databases, Settings). Use sharp, flat tab indicators (e.g., left border highlight).
components_and_interactions.forms: Use Shadcn components (Input, Select) customized to have sharp corners (rounded-none) and 1px borders.
components_and_interactions.ai_debug: When triggered, overlay or side-panel should slide in smoothly. Use a subtle typewriter effect or highlight for the suggested code fixes.
components_and_interactions.file_system: js files, not tsx. Ensure all Shadcn installations use the javascript flag.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons (Regular or Duotone weight). Key icons needed: Play (Run), ArrowsClockwise (Refresh), Database, ClockCounterClockwise (History), Folder (Files), Sparkle/MagicWand (AI Debug), Gear (Settings), Moon/Sun (Theme Toggle).

animations.hover: Instant background color shifts. No scaling on technical buttons.
animations.panels: If sidebar collapses, use a 0.2s ease transition.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with JavaScript (not TypeScript) as requested.
Install dependencies: Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui (configured for JS), @phosphor-icons/react.
Setup Dark/Light mode toggle correctly using next-themes or raw context, defaulting to Dark.
Build the 'Control Room' app shell layout using CSS Grid or Flexbox with 1px borders separating all panes.
Implement the Code Editor using a library like react-simple-code-editor or similar that supports syntax highlighting.
Implement the Results Table for SQL outputs. Ensure it can handle empty states gracefully.
Implement the Sidebar with mocked views for History, Files, and Settings.
Add the AI Debug functionality as a mocked feature that shows a suggestion panel when clicked.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
